diff --git a/App/Apps/W1/Shopify/app/src/Order handling/Codeunits/ShpfyCopyDocumentHandler.Codeunit.al b/App/Apps/W1/Shopify/app/src/Order handling/Codeunits/ShpfyCopyDocumentHandler.Codeunit.al
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..67036c57
--- /dev/null
+++ b/App/Apps/W1/Shopify/app/src/Order handling/Codeunits/ShpfyCopyDocumentHandler.Codeunit.al	
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+namespace Microsoft.Integration.Shopify;
+
+using Microsoft.Sales.Document;
+
+/// <summary>
+/// Codeunit Shpfy Copy Document Handler (ID 30366).
+/// Handles clearing Shopify Order Id and Order No when copying sales documents.
+/// </summary>
+codeunit 30366 "Shpfy Copy Document Handler"
+{
+    [EventSubscriber(ObjectType::Codeunit, Codeunit::"Copy Document Mgt.", 'OnAfterCopySalesHeader', '', false, false)]
+    local procedure OnAfterCopySalesHeader(var ToSalesHeader: Record "Sales Header"; OldSalesHeader: Record "Sales Header")
+    begin
+        // Clear Shopify Order Id and Order No when copying a sales invoice to prevent the new invoice from being skipped during sync
+        ToSalesHeader."Shpfy Order Id" := 0;
+        ToSalesHeader."Shpfy Order No." := '';
+    end;
+}
